title: CorpFlowAI homepage social card

usage.notes: slot:homepage_social_card. Used as og:image and twitter:image for the public homepage. Source is 1200×800 (the generator's native ratio); social platforms typically letterbox to 1200×630 — image composition keeps the subject clear of all OG safe-area edges.
